name: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners
analysis: CCEP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $98.8000, stop $93.4560, target $109.7279 (2.04:1) — then trail it.
